title: kali australe
intro: Kali australe, also known as Black Salt, is a type of volcanic rock salt that is used in Ayurvedic medicine. It is believed to have medicinal properties that help to balance the body's energy and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of Kali australe include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Kali australe is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tonics, and capsules, and can be consumed in various forms, including as a powder or in crystal form.
